events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to assess structural framing, specifically an undersized header (span vs. table - ME+DOC). The work is rough-complete. We need to decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Undersized header is a structural defect, non-compliant with code (IRC R502, R602). So decision: fail. Risk: high or critical? Undersized header can lead to structural failure, so critical. Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: maybe 80%? But framing is rough-complete, so maybe 90%? Value: not applicable. Sound source: not asked. Confidence: high. Event time, rate, order, workable: not asked. Findings: "Undersized header for span, does not meet IRC R502/R602 table requirements." Actions: "Replace header with properly sized member per code." Rationale: "Header size insufficient for span, violating prescriptive code tables." References: "IRC R502, R602". So output JSON.
